/usr/bin/g++ CMakeFiles/studybot_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/studybot_server.dir/src/controllers/AuthController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/studybot_server.dir/src/controllers/CardsController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/studybot_server.dir/src/controllers/ProgressController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/studybot_server.dir/src/controllers/LobbyController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/studybot_server.dir/src/filters/JwtFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/studybot_server.dir/src/ws/LobbyWebSocket.cpp.o -o studybot_server  /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lbcrypt /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.a -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmariadb.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
